<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

final class User
{
    private $email;
    public $createdAt;
}

<?php

declare(strict_types=1);

final class User
{
    private string $email;
    private ?DateTimeImmutable $createdAt = null;
    private static array $cache = [];
    public readonly string $id;
}
